texto: The early settlers amazed her--they had pluck, they led lives of sweaty drama. Theirs was a world of corsets and whipping posts and indentured servitude. People worked the land and died in ungainly ways. Modern life, in comparison, seemed a cinch.
explicacao: Citação de Jennifer Vanderbes sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The early settlers amazed her--they had pluck, they led lives of sweaty drama. Theirs was a world…” articula vida, history, modern-life em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e modern-life.
